% --------------------------------------------------------- %
% SHARED CV BODY -- included by main.tex (full) and          %
% cv-job.tex (lean). Do not edit unless you know the layout. %
% Lean-only differences are gated with \iflean ... \fi.      %
% --------------------------------------------------------- %

% Fetch user details
\input{details}

% header (spans full width)
\rhead{\header{\firstname}{\lastname}{\postnomial}{\pronoun}{\middlename}}

% paracol for sidebar + main content flow
\setcolumnwidth{0.18\paperwidth, 0.78\paperwidth}
\setlength{\columnsep}{0.02\paperwidth}
\begin{paracol}{2}

% Left column -- Sidebar (ancillary & personality info)
\thinfont\color{grey}
\raggedleft

\sidebarsection{Contact}
\iconlink{\email}{mailto:}{envelope}
\iconlink{\address}{}{map-marker-alt}

\sidebarsection{Platforms}
\iconlink{\website}{https://}{link}
\iconlink{\linkedinusername}{https://www.linkedin.com/in/}{linkedin}
\iconlink{\githubusername}{https://github.com/}{github}
\iconlink{\orcidid}{https://orcid.org/}{orcid}

\sidebarsection{Publications}
{\small\faIcon{newspaper}\hspace{1mm}\href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.14407}{ExoClock DR IV (2025)}}\par
{\small\faIcon{graduation-cap}\hspace{1mm}2 Academic Theses}\par
\iflean\else
{\small\faIcon{file-alt}\hspace{1mm}Extended Project (2017)}\par
\fi

\iflean\else
\sidebarsection{Talks \& Conferences}
{\small\faIcon{comments}\hspace{1mm}\href{https://britastro.org/event/exoplanet-2023sep}{BAA Exoplanet Webinar (2023)}}\par
{\small\faIcon{chalkboard-teacher}\hspace{1mm}\textit{Computational Modelling of TTVs}}\par
\fi

\sidebarsection{Open Source}
{\small\faIcon{building}\hspace{1mm}\href{https://github.com/canonical/maas}{@canonical -- MAAS}}\par
{\small\faIcon{code-branch}\hspace{1mm}\href{https://github.com/Skiylia-Lang}{@Skiylia-Lang -- Founder}}\par
{\small\faIcon{code}\hspace{1mm}\href{https://github.com/SK1Y101}{My GitHub Repositories}}\par

\showsimplelanguages{languages}{Languages}
\showsidebarhobbies{}
\newpage\showsidebarskills{Skills}

\switchcolumn

% Right column -- Main body content
\mainsection{
    \showsummary{Profile}
    \showcategory{briefcase}{Experience}{jobcompanies}{jobpositions}
    \showcategory{user-graduate}{Education}{educationschools}{educationcourses}
    \showproject{book-open}{Projects and Publications}{projects}
    \showmainmemberships{id-card}
    \showproject{trophy}{Awards}{awards}
}

\end{paracol}
